refresh_history.note: Initial render against partial proposal-reviews corpus (371 threads).

Refresh against full corpus (602 threads / 25,428 posts / 11,674 substantive). Canonical archetype labels applied (c1/c2/c3/c4/c5/c6/c8); post 9 mapped to c5-skeptic variant; per-post cluster_id + label fields fully updated (fix for partial-refresh anti-pattern that previously left body metadata on old k=12 raw IDs).

Evolution-process corpus-artifact deflation applied. angle_ranking_top6 re-computed against non-Evolution reliable-top-5 (base: naming 30 / error-handling 26 / documentation 26 / type-system 24 / scope-motivation 24). Derivation basis: manual synthesis from analysis.md reliable-top-5 + characterize_package.py weights; pending skill-level [FREVIEW-013] VENUE_ANGLE_DEFLATORS + [FREVIEW-011] refresh-atomicity enforcement.

angle_ranking_deflated_from_top6.label: Evolution process / acceptance criteria (SemVer subset only for related-projects)
angle_ranking_deflated_from_top6.deflation_rationale: Corpus artifact: Evolution-process base_pct is inflated by the corpus composition (468 proposal-reviews of 602 threads). The 'acceptance criteria' framing does not literally apply to a related-projects venue; only the SemVer/breaking-change subset of concerns survives. Score deflated from 52.5 to ~12 accordingly. Formal mechanism pending skill-level [FREVIEW-013] VENUE_ANGLE_DEFLATORS.
